settings.declaration_text: You were made for more than blending in.
settings.story_heading: In the beginning / was the Word.
settings.story_body:
Maison Logos is built for men and women of faith who carry themselves with intentional dignity.

This is not a Christian T-shirt brand. This is a luxury fashion house built on biblical foundation.

Premium faith-driven clothing for those who know who they are.
settings.archive_text: Past collections live here. Some things are worth keeping.
